    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\components\\BodyFigure.js",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 18
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 182,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function BodyFigure({ weight, height, label, size = 120, id, variant, weightDiff, gender, goal }) {\n\n          &lt;circle cx={cx} cy={headR} r={headR * 0.95} fill={fillUrl} /&gt;\n          &lt;path\n            d={&#96;\n              M ${cx - 7} ${headR * 2 - 2}\n              L ${cx - shoulderW} ${shoulderY}\n              Q ${cx - waistW} ${waistY} ${cx - hipW * 0.85} ${hipY}\n              L ${cx - thighW} ${footY - 4}\n              Q ${cx - thighW * 0.5} ${hipY + 24} ${cx} ${hipY + 16}\n              Q ${cx + thighW * 0.5} ${hipY + 24} ${cx + thighW} ${footY - 4}\n              L ${cx + hipW * 0.85} ${hipY}\n              Q ${cx + waistW} ${waistY} ${cx + shoulderW} ${shoulderY}\n              L ${cx + 7} ${headR * 2 - 2}\n              Z\n            &#96;}\n            fill={fillUrl}\n          /&gt;\n        &lt;/g&gt;\n      &lt;/svg&gt;\n      {label &amp;&amp; &lt;span className=\"body-figure-label\"&gt;{label}&lt;/span&gt;}\n      &lt;span className=\"body-figure-meta\"&gt;\n        {weight != null &amp;&amp; &lt;&gt;{weight} kg&lt;/&gt;}\n        {isNow &amp;&amp; weightDiff != null &amp;&amp; Number(weightDiff) !== 0 &amp;&amp; (\n          &lt;span className={&#96;body-figure-delta ${Number(weightDiff) &lt; 0 ? 'body-figure-delta--loss' : 'body-figure-delta--gain'}&#96;}&gt;\n            {Number(weightDiff) &gt; 0 ? '+' : ''}{weightDiff} kg\n          &lt;/span&gt;\n        )}\n      &lt;/span&gt;\n\n      &lt;style jsx&gt;{&#96;\n        .body-figure-wrap {\n          display: flex;\n          flex-direction: column;\n          align-items: center;\n          gap: 8px;\n          transition: transform 0.2s ease;\n        }\n        .body-figure-wrap.body-figure-before {\n          opacity: 0.85;\n        }\n        .body-figure-wrap.body-figure-now .body-figure-svg {\n          filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 24px rgba(139, 92, 255, 0.35));\n        }\n        .body-figure-svg {\n          display: block;\n        }\n        .body-figure-label {\n          font-size: 14px;\n          font-weight: 700;\n          letter-spacing: 0.02em;\n          color: #a78bfa;\n        }\n        .body-figure-before .body-figure-label {\n          color: #94a3b8;\n        }\n        .body-figure-meta {\n          font-size: 12px;\n          color: #71717a;\n          font-weight: 500;\n          display: flex;\n          flex-direction: column;\n          align-items: center;\n          gap: 4px;\n        }\n        .body-figure-delta {\n          font-size: 11px;\n          padding: 3px 10px;\n          border-radius: 20px;\n          font-weight: 700;\n        }\n        .body-figure-delta--loss {\n          background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.25);\n          color: #4ade80;\n        }\n        .body-figure-delta--gain {\n          background: rgba(251, 146, 60, 0.25);\n          color: #fb923c;\n        }\n      \n}",

        "contents": "export default function BodyFigure({ weight, height, label, size = 120, id, variant, weightDiff, gender, goal }) {\n{&#96;\n        .body-figure-wrap {\n          display: flex;\n          flex-direction: column;\n          align-items: center;\n          gap: 8px;\n          transition: transform 0.2s ease;\n        }\n        .body-figure-wrap.body-figure-before {\n          opacity: 0.85;\n        }\n        .body-figure-wrap.body-figure-now .body-figure-svg {\n          filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 24px rgba(139, 92, 255, 0.35));\n        }\n        .body-figure-svg {\n          display: block;\n        }\n        .body-figure-label {\n          font-size: 14px;\n          font-weight: 700;\n          letter-spacing: 0.02em;\n          color: #a78bfa;\n        }\n        .body-figure-before .body-figure-label {\n          color: #94a3b8;\n        }\n        .body-figure-meta {\n          font-size: 12px;\n          color: #71717a;\n          font-weight: 500;\n          display: flex;\n          flex-direction: column;\n          align-items: center;\n          gap: 4px;\n        }\n        .body-figure-delta {\n          font-size: 11px;\n          padding: 3px 10px;\n          border-radius: 20px;\n          font-weight: 700;\n        }\n        .body-figure-delta--loss {\n          background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.25);\n          color: #4ade80;\n        }\n        .body-figure-delta--gain {\n          background: rgba(251, 146, 60, 0.25);\n          color: #fb923c;\n        }\n      &#96;}&lt;/style&gt;\n    &lt;/div&gt;\n  );\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\pages\\profil.js",
        "range": {

            "line": 1146,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function Profil() {\n\n                      &lt;BodyFigure\n                        weight={latestMetric.weight_kg}\n                        height={latestMetric.height_cm}\n                        label=\"Teď\"\n                        size={110}\n                        id=\"after\"\n                        variant=\"now\"\n                        weightDiff={weightDiff}\n                        gender={latestMetric.gender}\n                        goal={latestMetric.goal}\n                      /&gt;\n                      {latestMetric.created_at &amp;&amp; (\n                        &lt;span className=\"body-figure-date\"&gt;{formatDate(latestMetric.created_at)}&lt;/span&gt;\n                      )}\n                    &lt;/div&gt;\n                  &lt;/&gt;\n                ) : latestMetric ? (\n                  &lt;div className=\"body-figure-card body-figure-single\"&gt;\n                    &lt;BodyFigure\n                      weight={latestMetric.weight_kg}\n                      height={latestMetric.height_cm}\n                      label=\"Tvůj profil\"\n                      size={130}\n                      id=\"single\"\n                      gender={latestMetric.gender}\n                      goal={latestMetric.goal}\n                    /&gt;\n                    &lt;p className=\"body-figure-hint\"&gt;Vyplň další měření v průběhu času – postava se bude měnit podle tvého pokroku.&lt;/p&gt;\n                  &lt;/div&gt;\n                ) : (\n                  &lt;div className=\"body-figure-empty\"&gt;\n                    &lt;BodyFigure weight={70} height={175} label=\"Příklad\" size={100} id=\"example\" /&gt;\n                    &lt;p&gt;Vyplň dotazník, aby se ti zobrazila tvá postava a její změny v čase.&lt;/p&gt;\n                    &lt;Link href=\"/start\" className=\"btn-primary\"&gt;Vyplnit dotazník&lt;/Link&gt;\n                  &lt;/div&gt;\n                )}\n              &lt;/div&gt;\n            &lt;/section&gt;\n\n            {/* KPI karty – propojené s postavou a s historií tréninků */}\n            &lt;section className=\"profil-section\"&gt;\n              &lt;h2&gt;📊 Přehled pokroku&lt;/h2&gt;\n              &lt;p className=\"profil-section-hint profil-section-hint-sub\"&gt;\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\pages\\profil.js",
        "range": {

            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function Profil() {\n\n  const totalWorkouts = workouts.length;\n\n  // Přepočty podle tréninků (trenérský model: čas v pohybu + odhad spálených kcal)\n  const totalMinutesThisWeek = workoutsThisWeekList.reduce((sum, w) =&gt; sum + (Number(w.duration_min) || 0), 0);\n  const estimatedCaloriesThisWeek = workoutsThisWeekList.reduce((sum, w) =&gt; sum + estimatedCalories(w), 0);\n  const totalMinutesAll = workouts.reduce((sum, w) =&gt; sum + (Number(w.duration_min) || 0), 0);\n  const estimatedCaloriesAll = workouts.reduce((sum, w) =&gt; sum + estimatedCalories(w), 0);\n\n  const firstMetric = metrics.length &gt; 0 ? metrics[metrics.length - 1] : null;\n  const latestMetric = metrics.length &gt; 0 ? metrics[0] : null;\n  const hasBeforeAfter = firstMetric &amp;&amp; latestMetric &amp;&amp; (firstMetric.id !== latestMetric.id || firstMetric.weight_kg !== latestMetric.weight_kg);\n\n  // Aktuální váha a změna od začátku = stejný zdroj jako postavy (první vs poslední měření), aby vše sedělo\n  const currentWeight = latestMetric?.weight_kg ?? (weightHistory.length ? weightHistory[weightHistory.length - 1]?.weight : null);\n  const weightDiff = (latestMetric?.weight_kg != null &amp;&amp; firstMetric?.weight_kg != null)\n    ? (latestMetric.weight_kg - firstMetric.weight_kg).toFixed(1)\n    : null;\n\n  // Graf váhy z měření (chronologicky), aby odpovídal postavě a KPI\n  const chartWeightData = metrics\n    .filter((m) =&gt; m.weight_kg != null &amp;&amp; m.created_at)\n    .map((m) =&gt; ({ date: m.created_at.split('T')[0], weight: m.weight_kg }))\n    .reverse();\n\n  return (\n    &lt;&gt;\n      &lt;Header /&gt;\n}",
        "signatures": {

            "text": "export default function Profil() {",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\components\\BodyFigure.js",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 94
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 16,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "function bmiToShape(weight, height) {\n  if (!weight || !height || height &lt;= 0) return { torso: 0.5, legs: 0.5 };\n  const bmi = weight / ((height / 100) ** 2);\n  const t = bmi &lt; 18 ? 0.15 : bmi &lt; 22 ? 0.35 : bmi &lt; 26 ? 0.5 : bmi &lt; 30 ? 0.7 : 0.9;\n  const l = bmi &lt; 20 ? 0.3 : bmi &lt; 26 ? 0.5 : 0.75;\n  return { torso: t, legs: l };\n}\n\nfunction normalizeGender(g) {\n  if (!g) return null;\n}",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "function bmiToShape(weight, height) {",
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!weight || !height || height &lt;= 0) return { torso: 0.5, legs: 0.5 };",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "  const bmi = weight / ((height / 100) ** 2);",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "  const t = bmi &lt; 18 ? 0.15 : bmi &lt; 22 ? 0.35 : bmi &lt; 26 ? 0.5 : bmi &lt; 30 ? 0.7 : 0.9;",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "  const l = bmi &lt; 20 ? 0.3 : bmi &lt; 26 ? 0.5 : 0.75;",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "  return { torso: t, legs: l };",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "function normalizeGender(g) {",
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  if (!g) return null;",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.30174851417541504
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {

            "column": 1

        "contents": "export default function Profil() {\n() =&gt; {\n\n              return (\n                &lt;section className=\"profil-section\" key=\"weight-chart\"&gt;\n                  &lt;h2&gt;⚖️ Vývoj váhy&lt;/h2&gt;\n                  &lt;p className=\"profil-section-hint profil-section-hint-sub\"&gt;Podle tvých záznamů měření (stejná data jako „Předtím“ / „Teď“).&lt;/p&gt;\n                  &lt;div className=\"weight-chart\"&gt;\n                    &lt;svg className=\"weight-chart-svg\" viewBox={&#96;0 0 ${chartW} ${chartH}&#96;} preserveAspectRatio=\"xMidYMid meet\"&gt;\n                      &lt;defs&gt;\n                        &lt;linearGradient id=\"weightLineGrad\" x1=\"0%\" y1=\"0%\" x2=\"0%\" y2=\"100%\"&gt;\n                          &lt;stop offset=\"0%\" stopColor=\"#9b5cff\" stopOpacity=\"0.35\" /&gt;\n                          &lt;stop offset=\"100%\" stopColor=\"#7c3aed\" stopOpacity=\"0\" /&gt;\n                        &lt;/linearGradient&gt;\n                      &lt;/defs&gt;\n                      {areaD &amp;&amp; &lt;path fill=\"url(#weightLineGrad)\" d={areaD} className=\"weight-chart-area\" /&gt;}\n                      &lt;path fill=\"none\" stroke=\"#a78bfa\" strokeWidth=\"2.5\" strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\" d={pathD} className=\"weight-chart-line\" /&gt;\n                      {points.map(([x, y], i) =&gt; (\n                        &lt;g key={&#96;${chartWeightData[i].date}-${i}&#96;}&gt;\n                          &lt;circle cx={x} cy={y} r=\"4\" className=\"weight-chart-dot\" /&gt;\n                          &lt;title&gt;{&#96;${chartWeightData[i].date}: ${chartWeightData[i].weight} kg&#96;}&lt;/title&gt;\n                        &lt;/g&gt;\n                      ))}\n                    &lt;/svg&gt;\n                    &lt;div className=\"weight-chart-labels\"&gt;\n                      {chartWeightData.map((p, i) =&gt; (\n                        &lt;span key={&#96;${p.date}-${i}&#96;}\n                      )\n            }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\pages\\profil.js",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 1146,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function Profil() {\n\n\n  async function handleAddWeight(e) {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    if (!session) return;\n    const w = Number(weightForm.weight_kg);\n    if (Number.isNaN(w) || w &lt; 30 || w &gt; 300) {\n      setWeightError('Váha musí být mezi 30 a 300 kg.');\n      return;\n    }\n    setSubmittingWeight(true);\n    setWeightError('');\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch('/api/quick-weight', {\n        method: 'POST',\n        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${session.access_token}&#96; },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ weight_kg: w, date: weightForm.date || undefined }),\n      });\n      const json = await res.json();\n      if (res.ok) {\n        setShowWeightModal(false);\n        setWeightForm({ date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], weight_kg: '' });\n        refetchProfile();\n      } else setWeightError(json.error || 'Nepodařilo se uložit.');\n    } catch (err) {\n      setWeightError(err.message || 'Chyba');\n    } finally {\n      setSubmittingWeight(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (!session &amp;&amp; !loading) return null;\n\n  const metrics = profile?.body_metrics || [];\n  const plans = profile?.plans || [];\n  const workouts = profile?.workouts || [];\n  const weightHistory = profile?.weight_history || [];\n  const userName = profile?.user?.name || profile?.user?.email?.split('@')[0] || 'Sportovče';\n\n  // Počty tréninků vždy z aktuálního seznamu (po přidání/smazání se přepočítají)\n  const now = new Date();\n  const dayOfWeek = now.getDay();\n  const daysToMonday = dayOfWeek === 0 ? 6 : dayOfWeek - 1;\n  const weekStart = new Date(now);\n  weekStart.setDate(now.getDate() - daysToMonday);\n  const weekStartStr = weekStart.toISOString().split('T')[0];\n  const workoutDateNorm = (w) =&gt; (w.workout_date || '').toString().slice(0, 10);\n  const workoutsThisWeekList = workouts.filter((w) =&gt; workoutDateNorm(w) &gt;= weekStartStr);\n  const workoutsThisWeek = workoutsThisWeekList.length;\n  const totalWorkouts = workouts.length;\n\n  // Přepočty podle tréninků (trenérský model: čas v pohybu + odhad spálených kcal)\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\ANALYZA_PROFILU.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 51
          }
        },
        "contents": "# Analýza a návrh profilu Body &amp; Mind ON\n\n## 1. Současný stav\n\n**Stránka &#96;/profil&#96;** (a alternativní &#96;/dashboard&#96;) zobrazuje:\n- E-mail a odhlášení\n- Seznam záznamů z &#96;body_metrics&#96; (datum, váha, výška, cíl, …)\n- Žádná vizualizace pokroku, žádný zápis tréninků\n\n**Dostupná data:**\n- &#96;body_metrics&#96; – váha, výška, věk, aktivita, stres, cíl, frekvence, datum\n- &#96;ai_generated_plans&#96; – plány s makroživinami, kaloriemi, platností\n\n**Chybějící data:**\n- Záznamy jednotlivých tréninků\n- Série historie váhy pro graf pokroku\n- Aktivní cíle (např. „splnil jsem 4/5 tréninků tento týden“)\n\n---\n\n## 2. Cílové funkce\n\n### 2.1 Vizualizace pokroku\n| Funkce | Popis |\n|--------|--------|\n| **Graf váhy** | Časová osa váhy z &#96;body_metrics&#96; – zobrazit trend (klesá / roste / stagnace) |\n| **Týdenní přehled** | Kolik tréninků tento týden, kalorie dodržené, makra |\n| **Streak** | Počet po sobě jdoucích týdnů s alespoň X tréninky |\n| **KPI karty** | „Tento týden 3 tréninky“, „Váha −1,2 kg od začátku“ |\n\n### 2.2 Záznam tréninků\n| Funkce | Popis |\n|--------|--------|\n| **Rychlý zápis** | Tlačítko „Zapsat trénink“ → datum, typ (silový / kardio / strečink), délka (min), poznámka |\n| **Historie tréninků** | Seznam s filtrováním (týden / měsíc), editace, smazání |\n| **Integrace s plánem** | Zobrazení „Dnes máš v plánu XY“ z AI plánu |\n\n### 2.3 Další vylepšení\n- Rychlé přidání váhy (bez celého dotazníku)\n- Zobrazení aktuálního AI plánu (náhled HTML)\n- Čitelný, moderní design – tmavý motiv, gradienty, ikony\n- Responzivita pro mobil\n\n---\n\n## 3. Datový model\n\n### Nová tabulka &#96;workouts&#96;\n&#96;&#96;&#96;sql\ncreate table workouts (\n  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),",
        "signatures": {},

        "contents": "import { useState } from \"react\";\n\nexport default function ProgramForm({ planType }) {\n  const [form, setForm] = useState({\n    name: \"\",\n    email: \"\",\n    gender: \"Muž\",\n    age: \"\",\n    height: \"\",\n    weight: \"\",\n    notes: \"\",\n  });\n\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [success, setSuccess] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(null);\n\n  const handleChange = (e) =&gt; setForm({ ...form, [e.target.name]: e.target.value });\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e) =&gt; {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setLoading(true);\n    setError(null);\n\n    try {\n      const genderNorm = form.gender?.includes('Žena') || form.gender === 'female' ? 'female' : 'male';\n      const payload = {\n        name: form.name?.trim() || null,\n        email: form.email?.trim() || null,\n        gender: genderNorm,\n        age: form.age ? Number(form.age) : null,\n        height: form.height ? Number(form.height) : null,\n        weight: form.weight ? Number(form.weight) : null,\n        activity: 'stredne',\n        stress: 'medium',\n        worktype: 'office_it',\n        goal: 'udrzovani',\n        frequency: '2-3x týdně',\n        notes: form.notes?.trim() || null,\n        program: planType || 'START',\n      };\n\n      const res = await fetch('/api/body-metrics', {\n        method: 'POST',\n        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n        body: JSON.stringify(payload),\n      });\n\n      const text = await res.text();\n      let data;\n      try {\n        data = text ? JSON.parse(text) : {};\n      } catch {\n        data = { error: res.ok ? 'Neplatná odpověď serveru.' : &#96;Chyba ${res.status}&#96; };\n      }\n\n      if (res.ok) {\n        setSuccess(true);\n      } else {\n        setError(data?.error || data?.message || 'Odeslání se nezdařilo. Zkus to znovu.');\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      setError('Chyba připojení: ' + (err.message || 'Zkus to znovu.'));\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  if (success) {\n    return (\n      &lt;div\n}",

            "text": "        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "        body: JSON.stringify(payload),",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "      const text = await res.text();",

          },
          {
            "text": "      let data;",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "      try {",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "        data = text ? JSON.parse(text) : {};",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (res.ok) {",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },

            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 60

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 63

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\pages\\api\\profile.js",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 3
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 83,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default async function handler(req, res) {\n\n    bodyMetrics\n      .filter(m =&gt; m.weight_kg != null &amp;&amp; m.created_at)\n      .forEach(m =&gt; {\n        const d = m.created_at.split('T')[0];\n        if (!(d in weightByDate)) weightByDate[d] = m.weight_kg;\n      });\n    const weightHistory = Object.entries(weightByDate)\n      .map(([date, weight]) =&gt; ({ date, weight }))\n      .sort((a, b) =&gt; (a.date || '').localeCompare(b.date || ''));\n\n    const now = new Date();\n    const weekStart = new Date(now);\n    weekStart.setDate(now.getDate() - now.getDay() + (now.getDay() === 0 ? -6 : 1));\n    const weekStartStr = weekStart.toISOString().split('T')[0];\n    const workoutsThisWeek = workouts.filter(w =&gt; (w.workout_date || '') &gt;= weekStartStr).length;\n\n    return res.status(200).json({\n      user: {\n        id: user.id,\n        email: user.email,\n        name: user.user_metadata?.name || null\n      },\n      body_metrics: bodyMetrics,\n      plans: plansData,\n      workouts,\n      weight_history: weightHistory,\n      stats: {\n        workouts_this_week: workoutsThisWeek,\n        total_workouts: workouts.length\n      }\n    });\n  } catch (err) {\n    console.error('[profile] ERROR:', err);\n    return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Chyba serveru' });\n  }\n}",
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\STRUKTURA_A_NAVRHY.md",

          "endPosition": {
            "line": 47
          }
        },
        "contents": "# Body &amp; Mind ON – Struktura projektu a návrhy úprav\n\nProjekt jsem prošel celý. Níže je **přehled struktury**, **co už je opraveno** a **doporučené úpravy**.\n\n---\n\n## 1. Aktuální struktura\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\nbody-mind-on/\n├── .cursor/\n│   └── instructions.md      # Pravidla projektu\n├── components/\n│   ├── Footer.js\n│   ├── Header.js\n│   ├── LayoutSection.js    # Tailwind třídy (Tailwind v projektu není)\n│   ├── Pricing.tsx         # Jediný TS soubor\n│   └── ProgramForm.js      # Tailwind třídy\n├── lib/\n│   ├── generatePlan.js     # AI plán + e-mail (opraveno: přidán generatePlan pro API)\n│   ├── mail.js             # Nodemailer – odeslání plánu\n│   ├── openai.js            # OpenAI klient\n│   ├── pricing.ts          # Data ceníku (TypeScript)\n│   ├── supabaseClient.js   # Klient pro prohlížeč (anon key)\n│   └── supabaseServer.js   # Klient pro API (service role)\n├── pages/\n│   ├── _app.js\n│   ├── _document.js\n│   ├── index.js            # Landing\n│   ├── index.html          # Statická stránka s iframe (HeyGen) – nezapadá do Pages routeru\n│   ├── admin.js, club.js, onboarding.js, pricing.js, register.js, signup.js, start.js, training.js, vip.js\n│   └── api/\n│       ├── assistant-intake.js  # Tabulka „registrations“, SMTP_USER/SMTP_PASS\n│       ├── body-metrics.js      # Tabulka „body_metrics“, volá generatePlanForEmail\n│       ├── generate-plan.js     # Vrací { html, metrics } – nyní funguje\n│       └── sessions.js          # Přihlášený uživatel, rezervace sezení\n├── public/\n│   └── robots.txt\n├── styles/\n│   └── globals.css         # Sjednoceno (odstraněna duplicita :root/body)\n├── next.config.js\n├── package.json\n└── jsconfig.json           # aliasy @/components/*, @/lib/*\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\pages\\profil.js",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 1146,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function Profil() {\n\n            &lt;section className=\"profil-section\"&gt;\n              &lt;h2&gt;📊 Přehled pokroku&lt;/h2&gt;\n              &lt;p className=\"profil-section-hint profil-section-hint-sub\"&gt;\n                Všechny hodnoty se přepočítávají z toho, co zapíšeš: typ tréninku a délka určí počet jednotek, odhad času i spálené energie. Váha a změna vycházejí z měření.\n              &lt;/p&gt;\n              &lt;div className=\"kpi-grid\"&gt;\n                &lt;div className=\"kpi-card kpi-card-workouts\"&gt;\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-icon\"&gt;🏋️&lt;/span&gt;\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-value\"&gt;{workoutsThisWeek}&lt;/span&gt;\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-label\"&gt;Tréninků tento týden&lt;/span&gt;\n                &lt;/div&gt;\n                &lt;div className=\"kpi-card kpi-card-total\"&gt;\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-icon\"&gt;📈&lt;/span&gt;\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-value\"&gt;{totalWorkouts}&lt;/span&gt;\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-label\"&gt;Celkem tréninků&lt;/span&gt;\n                &lt;/div&gt;\n                &lt;div className=\"kpi-card kpi-card-time\"&gt;\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-icon\"&gt;⏱️&lt;/span&gt;\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-value\"&gt;{totalMinutesThisWeek} min&lt;/span&gt;\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-label\"&gt;Čas v pohybu (týden)&lt;/span&gt;\n                &lt;/div&gt;\n                &lt;div className=\"kpi-card kpi-card-calories\"&gt;\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-icon\"&gt;🔥&lt;/span&gt;\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-value\"&gt;~{estimatedCaloriesThisWeek} kcal&lt;/span&gt;\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-label\"&gt;Odhad spáleno (týden)&lt;/span&gt;\n                &lt;/div&gt;\n                &lt;div className=\"kpi-card kpi-card-weight\"&gt;\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-icon\"&gt;⚖️&lt;/span&gt;\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-value\"&gt;{currentWeight != null ? &#96;${currentWeight} kg&#96; : '—'}&lt;/span&gt;\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-label\"&gt;Aktuální váha&lt;/span&gt;\n                &lt;/div&gt;\n                &lt;div className=\"kpi-card kpi-card-trend\"&gt;\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-icon\"&gt;{weightDiff != null ? (weightDiff &lt; 0 ? '📉' : weightDiff &gt; 0 ? '📈' : '➖') : '📊'}&lt;/span&gt;\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-value\"&gt;\n}",

            "text": "                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-label\"&gt;Aktuální váha&lt;/span&gt;",

        "contents": "export default function Profil() {\n\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-icon\"&gt;{weightDiff != null ? (weightDiff &lt; 0 ? '📉' : weightDiff &gt; 0 ? '📈' : '➖') : '📊'}&lt;/span&gt;\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-value\"&gt;\n                    {weightDiff != null ? &#96;${weightDiff &gt; 0 ? '+' : ''}${weightDiff} kg&#96; : '—'}\n                  &lt;/span&gt;\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-label\"&gt;Změní od začátku&lt;/span&gt;\n                &lt;/div&gt;\n              &lt;/div&gt;\n              {(totalMinutesAll &gt; 0 || estimatedCaloriesAll &gt; 0) &amp;&amp; (\n                &lt;p className=\"profil-section-hint profil-kpi-total\"&gt;\n                  Celkem od začátku: {totalMinutesAll} min v pohybu, odhad ~{estimatedCaloriesAll} kcal (výpočet z typu a délky tréninků).\n                &lt;/p&gt;\n              )}\n            &lt;/section&gt;\n\n            {/* Graf váhy – stejný zdroj jako postava a KPI (měření) */}\n            {chartWeightData.length &gt;= 2 &amp;&amp; (() =&gt; {\n              const chartW = 600; const chartH = 180; const pad = { t: 24, r: 24, b: 32, l: 40 };\n              const innerW = chartW - pad.l - pad.r;\n            }\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\FLOW_START_DOTAZNIK.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 43
          }
        },
        "contents": "# Tok: formulář START → e-mail s plánem\n\nTento dokument popisuje **funkční tok** od odeslání dotazníku na [app.bodyandmindon.cz/start](https://app.bodyandmindon.cz/start) až po doručení e-mailu s AI plánem. Při úpravách kódu je nutné tento tok **zachovat beze změny chování**.\n\n---\n\n## 1. Přehled kroků\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n[Stránka /start]  →  POST /api/body-metrics  →  Supabase body_metrics\n                          ↓\n                    generatePlanForEmail(email)\n                          ↓\n                    Supabase body_metrics (SELECT)  →  OpenAI  →  ai_generated_plans (INSERT)\n                          ↓\n                    sendPlanEmail(email, planHtml)  →  Nodemailer (Gmail)  →  e-mail uživateli\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n- **Frontend:** pouze &#96;pages/start.js&#96; (formulář) → volá **jen** &#96;POST /api/body-metrics&#96;.\n- **E-mail s plánem** zajišťuje výhradně &#96;lib/mail.js&#96; (Nodemailer + GMAIL_USER / GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD). Endpoint &#96;assistant-intake&#96; a tabulka &#96;registrations&#96; tento tok **nepoužívají**.\n\n---\n\n## 2. Co frontend posílá (&#96;pages/start.js&#96;)\n\nFormulář odešle na &#96;/api/body-metrics&#96; JSON s těmito poli (názvy musí zůstat kvůli mapování v API):\n\n| Pole z formuláře | Typ   | Příklad / hodnoty |\n|------------------|--------|---------------------|\n| &#96;name&#96;           | string | „Jan Novák“ |\n| &#96;email&#96;          | string | „jan@example.com“ |\n| &#96;gender&#96;         | string | &#96;male&#96; \\| &#96;female&#96; |\n| &#96;age&#96;            | number/string | 30 |\n| &#96;height&#96;         | number/string | 180 |\n| &#96;weight&#96;         | number/string | 80 |\n| &#96;activity&#96;       | string | &#96;sedavy&#96; \\| &#96;stredne&#96; \\| &#96;velmi&#96; |\n| &#96;stress&#96;         | string | &#96;low&#96; \\| &#96;medium&#96; \\| &#96;high&#96; |\n| &#96;worktype&#96;       | string | &#96;office_it&#96; \\| &#96;manual&#96; \\| &#96;kombinovana&#96; |\n| &#96;goal&#96;           | string | &#96;redukce&#96; \\| &#96;nabirani_svaly&#96; \\| &#96;udrzovani&#96; |\n| &#96;frequency&#96;      | string | &#96;1-2x týdně&#96; \\| &#96;2-3x týdně&#96; \\| &#96;4-5x týdně&#96; |\n| &#96;notes&#96;          | string | volitelné |\n| &#96;program&#96;        | string | vždy &#96;START&#96; |",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "# Tok: formulář START → e-mail s plánem",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "Tento dokument popisuje **funkční tok** od odeslání dotazníku na [app.bodyandmindon.cz/start](https://app.bodyandmindon.cz/start) až po doručení e-mailu s AI plánem. Při úpravách kódu je nutné tento tok **zachovat beze změny chování**.",
            "lineNumber": 3

            "text": "## 1. Přehled kroků",

          },

            "lineNumber": 8

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\ANALYZA_PROFILU.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 47
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 110
          }
        },
        "contents": "### Nová tabulka &#96;workouts&#96;\n&#96;&#96;&#96;sql\ncreate table workouts (\n  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),\n  user_id uuid references auth.users(id) on delete cascade not null,\n  workout_date date not null,\n  workout_type text not null,  -- 'silovy' | 'kardio' | 'strečink' | 'joga' | 'ostatni'\n  duration_min int,\n  notes text,\n  created_at timestamptz default now()\n);\n\ncreate index workouts_user_date on workouts(user_id, workout_date desc);\nalter table workouts enable row level security;\ncreate policy \"Users can CRUD own workouts\" on workouts for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Využití stávajících dat\n- **Graf váhy**: z &#96;body_metrics&#96; – &#96;weight_kg&#96;, &#96;created_at&#96; (řazeno podle data)\n- **Počáteční váha**: první záznam z body_metrics\n- **Cíl z plánu**: z &#96;ai_generated_plans&#96; (goal → redukce = snižovat váhu, nabirani = zvyšovat)\n\n---\n\n## 4. Architektura řešení\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n[Profil stránka]\n    │\n    ├─ Hero + uvítání\n    │\n    ├─ Sekce: Přehled pokroku\n    │   ├─ 4× KPI karta (váha trend, tréninky tento týden, streak, splněné cíle)\n    │   └─ Graf váhy (line chart, posledních 30–90 dní)\n    │\n    ├─ Sekce: Rychlé akce\n    │   ├─ [+ Zapsat trénink] modal\n    │   └─ [+ Přidat váhu] modal (jen váha + datum)\n    │\n    ├─ Sekce: Historie tréninků\n    │   └─ Seznam s datumem, typem, délkou, poznámkou\n    │\n    ├─ Sekce: Moje metriky (stávající, vylepšený vzhled)\n    │\n    └─ Sekce: Můj plán (AI plán, rozbalitelné)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n## 5. Design – vizuální styl\n\n- **Pozadí**: tmavý gradient (#0a021f → #0a0a0f)\n- **Karty**: zaoblené, jemný border, hover efekty\n- **Akcenty**: fialová (#9b5cff), zelená (#22c55e), tyrkys (#0EA5E9)\n- **Typografie**: čistý sans-serif, hierarchie nadpisů\n- **Ikony**: jednoduché SVG nebo emoji pro rychlé rozpoznání (🏋️ trénink, ⚖️ váha, 📈 pokrok)\n- **Graf**: jednoduchý line chart (CSS nebo lehká knihovna např. recharts / lightweight-charts)\n\n---\n\n## 6. API endpointy\n\n| Metoda | Endpoint | Popis |",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "### Nová tabulka &#96;workouts&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;sql",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "create table workouts (",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "  user_id uuid references auth.users(id) on delete cascade not null,",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "  workout_date date not null,",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "  workout_type text not null,  -- 'silovy' | 'kardio' | 'strečink' | 'joga' | 'ostatni'",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "  duration_min int,",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "  notes text,",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "  created_at timestamptz default now()",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": ");",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "create index workouts_user_date on workouts(user_id, workout_date desc);",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "alter table workouts enable row level security;",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "create policy \"Users can CRUD own workouts\" on workouts for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "### Využití stávajících dat",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Graf váhy**: z &#96;body_metrics&#96; – &#96;weight_kg&#96;, &#96;created_at&#96; (řazeno podle data)",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Počáteční váha**: první záznam z body_metrics",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Cíl z plánu**: z &#96;ai_generated_plans&#96; (goal → redukce = snižovat váhu, nabirani = zvyšovat)",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "## 4. Architektura řešení",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73

            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\pages\\api\\body-metrics.js",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 132,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "// /pages/api/body-metrics.js\nimport { supabaseServer } from '../../lib/supabaseServer';\nimport { generatePlanForEmail } from '../../lib/generatePlan';\nimport { createAuthUserIfNew } from '../../lib/authHelpers';\n\nexport default async function handler(req, res) {\n  if (req.method !== 'POST') {\n    return res.status(405).json({ error: 'Method not allowed' });\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const b = req.body || {};\n\n    const payload = {\n      email: b.email?.trim() || null,\n      name: b.name?.trim() || null,\n      gender: normalizeGender(b.gender),\n      age: toNum(b.age),\n      height_cm: toNum(b.height || b.height_cm),\n      weight_kg: toNum(b.weight || b.weight_kg),\n      activity: normalizeActivity(b.activity),\n      stress_level: normalizeStress(b.stress || b.stress_level),\n      occupation: normalizeOccupation(b.worktype || b.occupation),\n      goal: normalizeGoal(b.goal),\n      freq_choice: normalizeFrequency(b.frequency || b.freq_choice),\n      weekly_sessions_user: getWeeklySessions(b.frequency || b.freq_choice),\n      notes: b.notes?.trim() || null,\n      program: b.program || 'START',\n      created_at: new Date().toISOString(),\n      user_id: null,\n    };\n\n    if (!payload.email) {\n      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'E-mail je povinný.' });\n    }\n    const password = typeof b.password === 'string' ? b.password.trim() : '';\n    if (password &amp;&amp; password.length &lt; 6) {\n      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Heslo musí mít alespoň 6 znaků.' });\n    }\n    const emailRegex = /^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/;\n    if (!emailRegex.test(payload.email)) {\n      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Zadej platnou e-mailovou adresu.' });\n    }\n\n    if (!payload.height_cm || !payload.weight_kg) {\n      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Chybí výška nebo váha.' });\n    }\n    if (payload.height_cm &lt; 100 || payload.height_cm &gt; 250) {\n      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Výška musí být mezi 100 a 250 cm.' });\n    }\n    if (payload.weight_kg &lt; 30 || payload.weight_kg &gt; 300) {\n      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Váha musí být mezi 30 a 300 kg.' });\n}",
        "signatures": {},

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\pages\\api\\quick-weight.js",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 93
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 71,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "import { supabaseServer } from '../../lib/supabaseServer';\n\nexport default async function handler(req, res) {\n  if (req.method !== 'POST') {\n    return res.status(405).json({ error: 'Method not allowed' });\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const auth = req.headers.authorization || '';\n    const token = auth.startsWith('Bearer ') ? auth.slice(7) : null;\n    if (!token) return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Nejste přihlášen' });\n\n    const { data: { user }, error: userErr } = await supabaseServer.auth.getUser(token);\n    if (userErr || !user) return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Neplatná session' });\n\n    const weight_kg = req.body?.weight_kg != null ? Number(req.body.weight_kg) : null;\n    if (weight_kg == null || weight_kg &lt; 30 || weight_kg &gt; 300) {\n      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Váha musí být mezi 30 a 300 kg.' });\n    }\n\n    const dateStr = req.body?.date?.trim?.();\n    const created_at = dateStr\n      ? new Date(dateStr).toISOString()\n      : new Date().toISOString();\n    if (Number.isNaN(Date.parse(created_at))) {\n      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Neplatné datum.' });\n    }\n\n    const { data: latest } = await supabaseServer\n      .from('body_metrics')\n      .select('*')\n      .eq('user_id', user.id)\n      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })\n      .limit(1)\n      .single();\n\n    const row = {\n      user_id: user.id,\n      weight_kg\n,\n    };\n}",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\pages\\start.js",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 4
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 349,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function Start() {\n\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e) =&gt; {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    if (formData.password &amp;&amp; formData.password.length &lt; 6) {\n      setStatus(\"❌ Heslo musí mít alespoň 6 znaků.\");\n      return;\n    }\n    if (formData.password !== formData.passwordConfirm) {\n      setStatus(\"❌ Hesla se neshodují.\");\n      return;\n    }\n    setStatus(\"⏳ Odesílám... (může trvat až minutu – generuje se plán a e-mail)\");\n\n    try {\n      const cleanedData = normalizeData(formData);\n      delete cleanedData.passwordConfirm;\n\n      const res = await fetch(\"/api/body-metrics\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify(cleanedData),\n      });\n\n      let result;\n      try {\n        const text = await res.text();\n        result = text ? JSON.parse(text) : {};\n      } catch (_) {\n        result = { error: res.ok ? \"Neplatná odpověď serveru.\" : &#96;Chyba ${res.status}&#96; };\n      }\n\n      if (res.ok) {\n        if (result.planSent === false) {\n          setStatus(\"⚠️ \" + (result.message || \"Údaje uloženy, ale e-mail s plánem se nepodařilo odeslat. Zkontroluj spam nebo napiš na info@bodyandmindon.cz.\"));\n        } else {\n          setStatus(\"✅ \" + (result.message || \"Údaje byly uloženy a plán byl odeslán na e-mail.\"));\n        }\n        setFormData({\n          name: \"\",\n          email: \"\",\n          password: \"\",\n          passwordConfirm: \"\",\n          gender: \"\",\n          age: \"\",\n          height: \"\",\n          weight: \"\",\n          activity: \"\",\n          stress: \"\",\n          worktype: \"\",\n          goal: \"\",\n          frequency: \"\",\n          notes: \"\",\n          program: \"START\",\n        });\n      } else {\n        setStatus(\"❌ Chyba: \" + (result.error || result.message || \"Nepodařilo se odeslat.\"));\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      setStatus(\"❌ Chyba připojení: \" + (err.message || \"Zkuste to znovu za chvíli.\"));\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    &lt;&gt;\n      &lt;Header /&gt;\n}",

        "contents": "export default function Profil() {\n (() =&gt; {\n              const chartW = 600; const chartH = 180; const pad = { t: 24, r: 24, b: 32, l: 40 };\n              const innerW = chartW - pad.l - pad.r; const innerH = chartH - pad.t - pad.b;\n              const max = Math.max(...chartWeightData.map((x) =&gt; x.weight));\n              const min = Math.min(...chartWeightData.map((x) =&gt; x.weight));\n              const range = max - min || 1;\n              const points = chartWeightData.map((p, i) =&gt; {\n                const x = pad.l + (chartWeightData.length &gt; 1 ? (i / (chartWeightData.length - 1)) * innerW : 0);\n                const y = pad.t + innerH - ((p.weight - min) / range) * innerH;\n                return [x, y];\n              });\n              const pathD = points.length ? &#96;M ${points.map(([x, y]) =&gt; &#96;${x} ${y}&#96;).join(' L ')}&#96; : '';\n              const areaD = pathD ? &#96;${pathD} L ${pad.l + innerW} ${pad.t + innerH} L ${pad.l} ${pad.t + innerH} Z&#96; : '';\n              return (\n                &lt;section className=\"profil-section\" key=\"weight-chart\"&gt;\n            }\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\lib\\generatePlan.js",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 134,
            "column": 1
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 226,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "/**\n * Vygeneruje AI plán pro daný e-mail a odešle ho.\n * @param {string} email - E-mail uživatele (musí mít záznam v body_metrics)\n * @param {object} [options] - Volby pro e-mail (loginPassword, loginUrl, existingAccount, loginUnavailable)\n * @returns {Promise&lt;{ok: boolean, message?: string}&gt;}\n */\nasync function generatePlanForEmail(email, options = {}) {\n  try {\n    console.log('🧩 Spouštím generatePlanForEmail pro:', email);\n\n    const { data: rows, error } = await supabaseServer\n      .from('body_metrics')\n      .select('*')\n      .eq('email', email)\n      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })\n      .limit(1);\n\n    if (error) throw error;\n    if (!rows?.length) throw new Error('Žádné metriky pro tento e-mail.');\n\n    const bm = rows[0];\n    console.log('📊 Načtené metriky:', bm);\n\n    const userPrompt = buildUserPrompt(bm);\n\n    const completion = await openai.chat.completions.create({\n      model: 'gpt-4o-mini',\n      temperature: 0.7,\n      max_tokens: 8192,\n      messages: [\n        { role: 'system', content: SYS },\n        { role: 'user', content: userPrompt },\n      ],\n    });\n\n    let planHtml = completion.choices?.[0]?.message?.content?.trim();\n    if (!planHtml) throw new Error('OpenAI nevrátil žádný plán.');\n\n    planHtml = extractHtmlFromAiOutput(planHtml);\n\n    console.log('✅ AI plán vygenerován.');\n\n    const opts = typeof options === 'object' ? options : {};\n    const planType = bm.goal === 'redukce' ? 'redukce' : bm.goal === 'nabirani_svaly' ? 'nabirani' : 'udrzovani';\n    const protein = Math.round((asNum(bm.weight_kg) || 70) * 1.8);\n    const kc = asNum(bm.calories_target) || 2200;\n    const fat = Math.round(kc * 0.25 / 9);\n    const carbs = Math.round((kc - protein * 4 - fat * 9) / 4);\n\n    const { error: insErr } = await supabaseServer\n      .from('ai_generated_plans')\n      .insert\n;\n}",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "contents": "export default function Profil() {\n() =&gt; {\n\n                      {chartWeightData.map((p, i) =&gt; (\n                        &lt;span key={&#96;${p.date}-${i}&#96;} className=\"weight-chart-label\" title={&#96;${p.date}: ${p.weight} kg&#96;}&gt;\n                          &lt;span className=\"weight-chart-label-value\"&gt;{p.weight}&lt;/span&gt;\n                          &lt;span className=\"weight-chart-label-date\"&gt;{formatShortDate(p.date)}&lt;/span&gt;\n                        &lt;/span&gt;\n                      ))}\n                    &lt;/div&gt;\n                  &lt;/div&gt;\n                &lt;/section&gt;\n              );\n            })()}\n\n            {/* Rychlé akce */}\n            &lt;section className=\"profil-section\"&gt;\n              &lt;h2&gt;⚡ Rychlé akce&lt;/h2&gt;\n              &lt;div className=\"action-buttons\"&gt;\n                &lt;button type=\"button\" onClick={() =&gt; setShowWorkoutModal(true)} className=\"btn-primary\"&gt;\n                  &lt;span&gt;+&lt;/span&gt; Zapsat trénink\n                &lt;/button&gt;\n                &lt;button type=\"button\" onClick={() =&gt; { setShowWeightModal(true); setWeightError(''); setWeightForm({ date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], weight_kg: latestMetric?.weight_kg != null ? String(latestMetric.weight_kg) : '' }); }} className=\"btn-primary btn-outline\"&gt;\n                  ⚖️ Přidat váhu\n                &lt;/button&gt;\n                &lt;Link href=\"/start\" className=\"btn-secondary\"&gt;\n                  Aktualizovat metriky\n                &lt;/Link&gt;\n              &lt;/div&gt;\n            &lt;/section&gt;\n\n            {/* Historie tréninků */}\n            &lt;section className=\"profil-section\"&gt;\n              &lt;h2&gt;🏋️ Historie tréninků&lt;/h2&gt;\n              {workouts.length === 0 ? (\n}",

      "codeBlock": {

          "endPosition": {

            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function Start() {\n\n          &lt;div className=\"row grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6\"&gt;\n            &lt;div&gt;\n              &lt;label className=\"label block mb-2 text-gray-400\"&gt;Výška (cm)&lt;/label&gt;\n              &lt;input\n                name=\"height\"\n                type=\"number\"\n                className=\"input w-full p-3 rounded-lg bg-[#0f0f0f] border border-gray-700 text-white\"\n                value={formData.height}\n                onChange={handleChange}\n                placeholder=\"180\"\n                required\n              /&gt;\n            &lt;/div&gt;\n            &lt;div&gt;\n              &lt;label className=\"label block mb-2 text-gray-400\"&gt;Váha (kg)&lt;/label&gt;\n              &lt;input\n                name=\"weight\"\n                type=\"number\"\n                className=\"input w-full p-3 rounded-lg bg-[#0f0f0f] border border-gray-700 text-white\"\n                value={formData.weight}\n                onChange={handleChange}\n                placeholder=\"80\"\n                required\n              /&gt;\n            &lt;/div&gt;\n          &lt;/div&gt;\n\n          {/* AKTIVITA + STRES */}\n          &lt;div className=\"row grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6\"&gt;\n            &lt;div&gt;\n              &lt;label className=\"label block mb-2 text-gray-400\"&gt;\n}",

        "contents": "export default function Profil() {\n (() =&gt; {\n              const chartW = 600; const chartH = 180; const pad = { t: 24, r: 24, b: 32, l: 40 };\n              const innerW = chartW - pad.l - pad.r; const innerH = chartH - pad.t - pad.b;\n              const max = Math.max(...chartWeightData.map((x) =&gt; x.weight));\n              const min = Math.min(...chartWeightData.map((x) =&gt; x.weight));\n              const range = max - min || 1;\n              const points = chartWeightData.map((p, i) =&gt; {\n                const x = pad.l + (chartWeightData.length &gt; 1 ? (i / (chartWeightData.length - 1)) * innerW : 0);\n                const y = pad.t + innerH - ((p.weight - min) / range) * innerH;\n                return [x, y];\n              });\n              const pathD = points.length ? &#96;M ${points.map(([x, y]) =&gt; &#96;${x} ${y}&#96;).join(' L ')}&#96; : '';\n              const areaD = pathD ? &#96;${pathD} L ${pad.l + innerW} ${pad.t + innerH} L ${pad.l} ${pad.t + innerH} Z&#96; : '';\n              return (\n                &lt;section className=\"profil-section\" key=\"weight-chart\"&gt;\n            }\n}",

        "contents": "export default function Profil() {\n\n  const totalWorkouts = workouts.length;\n\n  // Přepočty podle tréninků (trenérský model: čas v pohybu + odhad spálených kcal)\n  const totalMinutesThisWeek = workoutsThisWeekList.reduce((sum, w) =&gt; sum + (Number(w.duration_min) || 0), 0);\n  const estimatedCaloriesThisWeek = workoutsThisWeekList.reduce((sum, w) =&gt; sum + estimatedCalories(w), 0);\n  const totalMinutesAll = workouts.reduce((sum, w) =&gt; sum + (Number(w.duration_min) || 0), 0);\n  const estimatedCaloriesAll = workouts.reduce((sum, w) =&gt; sum + estimatedCalories(w), 0);\n\n  const firstMetric = metrics.length &gt; 0 ? metrics[metrics.length - 1] : null;\n  const latestMetric = metrics.length &gt; 0 ? metrics[0] : null;\n  const hasBeforeAfter = firstMetric &amp;&amp; latestMetric &amp;&amp; (firstMetric.id !== latestMetric.id || firstMetric.weight_kg !== latestMetric.weight_kg);\n\n  // Aktuální váha a změna od začátku = stejný zdroj jako postavy (první vs poslední měření), aby vše sedělo\n  const currentWeight = latestMetric?.weight_kg ?? (weightHistory.length ? weightHistory[weightHistory.length - 1]?.weight : null);\n  const weightDiff = (latestMetric?.weight_kg != null &amp;&amp; firstMetric?.weight_kg != null)\n    ? (latestMetric.weight_kg - firstMetric.weight_kg).toFixed(1)\n    : null;\n\n  // Graf váhy z měření (chronologicky), aby odpovídal postavě a KPI\n  const chartWeightData = metrics\n    .filter((m) =&gt; m.weight_kg != null &amp;&amp; m.created_at)\n    .map((m) =&gt; ({ date: m.created_at.split('T')[0], weight: m.weight_kg }))\n    .reverse();\n\n  return (\n    &lt;&gt;\n      &lt;Header /&gt;\n}",

        },
        "contents": "# Analýza a návrh profilu Body &amp; Mind ON\n\n## 1. Současný stav\n\n**Stránka &#96;/profil&#96;** (a alternativní &#96;/dashboard&#96;) zobrazuje:\n- E-mail a odhlášení\n- Seznam záznamů z &#96;body_metrics&#96; (datum, váha, výška, cíl, …)\n- Žádná vizualizace pokroku, žádný zápis tréninků\n\n**Dostupná data:**\n- &#96;body_metrics&#96; – váha, výška, věk, aktivita, stres, cíl, frekvence, datum\n- &#96;ai_generated_plans&#96; – plány s makroživinami, kaloriemi, platností\n\n**Chybějící data:**\n- Záznamy jednotlivých tréninků\n- Série historie váhy pro graf pokroku\n- Aktivní cíle (např. „splnil jsem 4/5 tréninků tento týden“)\n\n---\n\n## 2. Cílové funkce\n\n### 2.1 Vizualizace pokroku\n| Funkce | Popis |\n|--------|--------|\n| **Graf váhy** | Časová osa váhy z &#96;body_metrics&#96; – zobrazit trend (klesá / roste / stagnace) |\n| **Týdenní přehled** | Kolik tréninků tento týden, kalorie dodržené, makra |\n| **Streak** | Počet po sobě jdoucích týdnů s alespoň X tréninky |\n| **KPI karty** | „Tento týden 3 tréninky“, „Váha −1,2 kg od začátku“ |\n\n### 2.2 Záznam tréninků\n| Funkce | Popis |\n|--------|--------|\n| **Rychlý zápis** | Tlačítko „Zapsat trénink“ → datum, typ (silový / kardio / strečink), délka (min), poznámka |\n| **Historie tréninků** | Seznam s filtrováním (týden / měsíc), editace, smazání |\n| **Integrace s plánem** | Zobrazení „Dnes máš v plánu XY“ z AI plánu |\n\n### 2.3 Další vylepšení\n- Rychlé přidání váhy (bez celého dotazníku)\n- Zobrazení aktuálního AI plánu (náhled HTML)\n- Čitelný, moderní design – tmavý motiv, gradienty, ikony\n- Responzivita pro mobil\n\n---\n\n## 3. Datový model\n\n### Nová tabulka &#96;workouts&#96;\n&#96;&#96;&#96;sql\ncreate table workouts (\n  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),",

            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.2 Záznam tréninků",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "| Funkce | Popis |",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "|--------|--------|",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "| **Rychlý zápis** | Tlačítko „Zapsat trénink“ → datum, typ (silový / kardio / strečink), délka (min), poznámka |",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "| **Historie tréninků** | Seznam s filtrováním (týden / měsíc), editace, smazání |",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "| **Integrace s plánem** | Zobrazení „Dnes máš v plánu XY“ z AI plánu |",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.3 Další vylepšení",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "- Rychlé přidání váhy (bez celého dotazníku)",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "- Zobrazení aktuálního AI plánu (náhled HTML)",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "- Čitelný, moderní design – tmavý motiv, gradienty, ikony",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "- Responzivita pro mobil",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "## 3. Datový model",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47

        "contents": "export default function Profil() {\n() =&gt; {\n\n                      {chartWeightData.map((p, i) =&gt; (\n                        &lt;span key={&#96;${p.date}-${i}&#96;} className=\"weight-chart-label\" title={&#96;${p.date}: ${p.weight} kg&#96;}&gt;\n                          &lt;span className=\"weight-chart-label-value\"&gt;{p.weight}&lt;/span&gt;\n                          &lt;span className=\"weight-chart-label-date\"&gt;{formatShortDate(p.date)}&lt;/span&gt;\n                        &lt;/span&gt;\n                      ))}\n                    &lt;/div&gt;\n                  &lt;/div&gt;\n                &lt;/section&gt;\n              );\n            })()}\n\n            {/* Rychlé akce */}\n            &lt;section className=\"profil-section\"&gt;\n              &lt;h2&gt;⚡ Rychlé akce&lt;/h2&gt;\n              &lt;div className=\"action-buttons\"&gt;\n                &lt;button type=\"button\" onClick={() =&gt; setShowWorkoutModal(true)} className=\"btn-primary\"&gt;\n                  &lt;span&gt;+&lt;/span&gt; Zapsat trénink\n                &lt;/button&gt;\n                &lt;button type=\"button\" onClick={() =&gt; { setShowWeightModal(true); setWeightError(''); setWeightForm({ date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], weight_kg: latestMetric?.weight_kg != null ?         "contents": "export default function Profil() {\n\n\n  async function handleAddWeight(e) {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    if (!session) return;\n    const w = Number(weightForm.weight_kg);\n    if (Number.isNaN(w) || w &lt; 30 || w &gt; 300) {\n      setWeightError('Váha musí být mezi 30 a 300 kg.');\n      return;\n    }\n    setSubmittingWeight(true);\n    setWeightError('');\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch('/api/quick-weight', {\n        method: 'POST',\n        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', Authorization: &#96;Bearer ${session.access_token}&#96; },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ weight_kg: w, date: weightForm.date || undefined }),\n      });\n      const json = await res.json();\n      if (res.ok) {\n        setShowWeightModal(false);\n        setWeightForm({ date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], weight_kg: '' });\n        refetchProfile();\n      } else setWeightError(json.error || 'Nepodařilo se uložit.');\n    } catch (err) {\n      setWeightError(err.message || 'Chyba');\n    } finally {\n      setSubmittingWeight(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (!session &amp;&amp; !loading) return null;\n\n  const metrics = profile?.body_metrics || [];\n  const plans = profile?.plans || [];\n  const workouts = profile?.workouts || [];\n  const weightHistory = profile?.weight_history || [];\n  const userName = profile?.user?.name || profile?.user?.email?.split('@')[0] || 'Sportovče';\n\n  // Počty tréninků vždy z aktuálního seznamu (po přidání/smazání se přepočítají)\n  const now = new Date();\n  const dayOfWeek = now.getDay();\n  const daysToMonday = dayOfWeek === 0 ? 6 : dayOfWeek - 1;\n  const weekStart = new Date(now);\n  weekStart.setDate(now.getDate() - daysToMonday);\n  const weekStartStr = weekStart.toISOString().split('T')[0];\n  const workoutDateNorm = (w) =&gt; (w.workout_date || '').toString().slice(0, 10);\n  const workoutsThisWeekList = workouts.filter((w) =&gt; workoutDateNorm(w) &gt;= weekStartStr);\n  const workoutsThisWeek = workoutsThisWeekList.length;\n  const totalWorkouts = workouts.length;\n\n  // Přepočty podle tréninků (trenérský model: čas v pohybu + odhad spálených kcal)\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\ANALYZA_PROFILU.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

          },
          "endPosition": {

        },
        "contents": "### Nová tabulka &#96;workouts&#96;\n&#96;&#96;&#96;sql\ncreate table workouts (\n  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),\n  user_id uuid references auth.users(id) on delete cascade not null,\n  workout_date date not null,\n  workout_type text not null,  -- 'silovy' | 'kardio' | 'strečink' | 'joga' | 'ostatni'\n  duration_min int,\n  notes text,\n  created_at timestamptz default now()\n);\n\ncreate index workouts_user_date on workouts(user_id, workout_date desc);\nalter table workouts enable row level security;\ncreate policy \"Users can CRUD own workouts\" on workouts for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Využití stávajících dat\n- **Graf váhy**: z &#96;body_metrics&#96; – &#96;weight_kg&#96;, &#96;created_at&#96; (řazeno podle data)\n- **Počáteční váha**: první záznam z body_metrics\n- **Cíl z plánu**: z &#96;ai_generated_plans&#96; (goal → redukce = snižovat váhu, nabirani = zvyšovat)\n\n---\n\n## 4. Architektura řešení\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n[Profil stránka]\n    │\n    ├─ Hero + uvítání\n    │\n    ├─ Sekce: Přehled pokroku\n    │   ├─ 4× KPI karta (váha trend, tréninky tento týden, streak, splněné cíle)\n    │   └─ Graf váhy (line chart, posledních 30–90 dní)\n    │\n    ├─ Sekce: Rychlé akce\n    │   ├─ [+ Zapsat trénink] modal\n    │   └─ [+ Přidat váhu] modal (jen váha + datum)\n    │\n    ├─ Sekce: Historie tréninků\n    │   └─ Seznam s datumem, typem, délkou, poznámkou\n    │\n    ├─ Sekce: Moje metriky (stávající, vylepšený vzhled)\n    │\n    └─ Sekce: Můj plán (AI plán, rozbalitelné)\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n---\n\n## 5. Design – vizuální styl\n\n- **Pozadí**: tmavý gradient (#0a021f → #0a0a0f)\n- **Karty**: zaoblené, jemný border, hover efekty\n- **Akcenty**: fialová (#9b5cff), zelená (#22c55e), tyrkys (#0EA5E9)\n- **Typografie**: čistý sans-serif, hierarchie nadpisů\n- **Ikony**: jednoduché SVG nebo emoji pro rychlé rozpoznání (🏋️ trénink, ⚖️ váha, 📈 pokrok)\n- **Graf**: jednoduchý line chart (CSS nebo lehká knihovna např. recharts / lightweight-charts)\n\n---\n\n## 6. API endpointy\n\n| Metoda | Endpoint | Popis |",
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "### Nová tabulka &#96;workouts&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;sql",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "create table workouts (",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "  user_id uuid references auth.users(id) on delete cascade not null,",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "  workout_date date not null,",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "  workout_type text not null,  -- 'silovy' | 'kardio' | 'strečink' | 'joga' | 'ostatni'",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "  duration_min int,",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "  notes text,",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "  created_at timestamptz default now()",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": ");",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "create index workouts_user_date on workouts(user_id, workout_date desc);",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "alter table workouts enable row level security;",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "create policy \"Users can CRUD own workouts\" on workouts for all using (auth.uid() = user_id);",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "### Využití stávajících dat",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Graf váhy**: z &#96;body_metrics&#96; – &#96;weight_kg&#96;, &#96;created_at&#96; (řazeno podle data)",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Počáteční váha**: první záznam z body_metrics",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Cíl z plánu**: z &#96;ai_generated_plans&#96; (goal → redukce = snižovat váhu, nabirani = zvyšovat)",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },

            "lineNumber": 69

          {
            "text": "---",

          {
            "lineNumber": 71

          {
            "text": "## 4. Architektura řešení",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "[Profil stránka]",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "    │",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "    ├─ Hero + uvítání",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "    │",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "    ├─ Sekce: Přehled pokroku",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "    │   ├─ 4× KPI karta (váha trend, tréninky tento týden, streak, splněné cíle)",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "    │   └─ Graf váhy (line chart, posledních 30–90 dní)",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "    │",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "    ├─ Sekce: Rychlé akce",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "    │   ├─ [+ Zapsat trénink] modal",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "    │   └─ [+ Přidat váhu] modal (jen váha + datum)",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "    │",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "    ├─ Sekce: Historie tréninků",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "    │   └─ Seznam s datumem, typem, délkou, poznámkou",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "    │",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "    ├─ Sekce: Moje metriky (stávající, vylepšený vzhled)",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "    │",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "    └─ Sekce: Můj plán (AI plán, rozbalitelné)",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "## 5. Design – vizuální styl",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Pozadí**: tmavý gradient (#0a021f → #0a0a0f)",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Karty**: zaoblené, jemný border, hover efekty",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Akcenty**: fialová (#9b5cff), zelená (#22c55e), tyrkys (#0EA5E9)",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Typografie**: čistý sans-serif, hierarchie nadpisů",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Ikony**: jednoduché SVG nebo emoji pro rychlé rozpoznání (🏋️ trénink, ⚖️ váha, 📈 pokrok)",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Graf**: jednoduchý line chart (CSS nebo lehká knihovna např. recharts / lightweight-charts)",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "## 6. API endpointy",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "| Metoda | Endpoint | Popis |",
            "lineNumber": 110
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2728356122970581
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\components\\BodyFigure.js",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 18
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 182,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function BodyFigure({ weight, height, label, size = 120, id, variant, weightDiff, gender, goal }) {\n\n          &lt;circle cx={cx} cy={headR} r={headR * 0.95} fill={fillUrl} /&gt;\n          &lt;path\n            d={&#96;\n              M ${cx - 7} ${headR * 2 - 2}\n              L ${cx - shoulderW} ${shoulderY}\n              Q ${cx - waistW} ${waistY} ${cx - hipW * 0.85} ${hipY}\n              L ${cx - thighW} ${footY - 4}\n              Q ${cx - thighW * 0.5} ${hipY + 24} ${cx} ${hipY + 16}\n              Q ${cx + thighW * 0.5} ${hipY + 24} ${cx + thighW} ${footY - 4}\n              L ${cx + hipW * 0.85} ${hipY}\n              Q ${cx + waistW} ${waistY} ${cx + shoulderW} ${shoulderY}\n              L ${cx + 7} ${headR * 2 - 2}\n              Z\n            &#96;}\n            fill={fillUrl}\n          /&gt;\n        &lt;/g&gt;\n      &lt;/svg&gt;\n      {label &amp;&amp; &lt;span className=\"body-figure-label\"&gt;{label}&lt;/span&gt;}\n      &lt;span className=\"body-figure-meta\"&gt;\n        {weight != null &amp;&amp; &lt;&gt;{weight} kg&lt;/&gt;}\n        {isNow &amp;&amp; weightDiff != null &amp;&amp; Number(weightDiff) !== 0 &amp;&amp; (\n          &lt;span className={&#96;body-figure-delta ${Number(weightDiff) &lt; 0 ? 'body-figure-delta--loss' : 'body-figure-delta--gain'}&#96;}&gt;\n            {Number(weightDiff) &gt; 0 ? '+' : ''}{weightDiff} kg\n          &lt;/span&gt;\n        )}\n      &lt;/span&gt;\n\n      &lt;style jsx&gt;{&#96;\n        .body-figure-wrap {\n          display: flex;\n          flex-direction: column;\n          align-items: center;\n          gap: 8px;\n          transition: transform 0.2s ease;\n        }\n        .body-figure-wrap.body-figure-before {\n          opacity: 0.85;\n        }\n        .body-figure-wrap.body-figure-now .body-figure-svg {\n          filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 24px rgba(139, 92, 255, 0.35));\n        }\n        .body-figure-svg {\n          display: block;\n        }\n        .body-figure-label {\n          font-size: 14px;\n          font-weight: 700;\n          letter-spacing: 0.02em;\n          color: #a78bfa;\n        }\n        .body-figure-before .body-figure-label {\n          color: #94a3b8;\n        }\n        .body-figure-meta {\n          font-size: 12px;\n          color: #71717a;\n          font-weight: 500;\n          display: flex;\n          flex-direction: column;\n          align-items: center;\n          gap: 4px;\n        }\n        .body-figure-delta {\n          font-size: 11px;\n          padding: 3px 10px;\n          border-radius: 20px;\n          font-weight: 700;\n        }\n        .body-figure-delta--loss {\n          background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.25);\n          color: #4ade80;\n        }\n        .body-figure-delta--gain {\n          background: rgba(251, 146, 60, 0.25);\n          color: #fb923c;\n        }\n      \n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\pages\\profil.js",

          "startPosition": {

            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function Profil() {\n\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-icon\"&gt;{weightDiff != null ? (weightDiff &lt; 0 ? '📉' : weightDiff &gt; 0 ? '📈' : '➖') : '📊'}&lt;/span&gt;\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-value\"&gt;\n                    {weightDiff != null ? &#96;${weightDiff &gt; 0 ? '+' : ''}${weightDiff} kg&#96; : '—'}\n                  &lt;/span&gt;\n                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-label\"&gt;Změní od začátku&lt;/span&gt;\n                &lt;/div&gt;\n              &lt;/div&gt;\n              {(totalMinutesAll &gt; 0 || estimatedCaloriesAll &gt; 0) &amp;&amp; (\n                &lt;p className=\"profil-section-hint profil-kpi-total\"&gt;\n                  Celkem od začátku: {totalMinutesAll} min v pohybu, odhad ~{estimatedCaloriesAll} kcal (výpočet z typu a délky tréninků).\n                &lt;/p&gt;\n              )}\n            &lt;/section&gt;\n\n            {/* Graf váhy – stejný zdroj jako postava a KPI (měření) */}\n            {chartWeightData.length &gt;= 2 &amp;&amp; (() =&gt; {\n              const chartW = 600; const chartH = 180; const pad = { t: 24, r: 24, b: 32, l: 40 };\n              const innerW = chartW - pad.l - pad.r;\n            }\n}",
        "signatures": {

            "lineNumber": 336
          },
          {
            "text": "                  &lt;span className=\"kpi-value\"&gt;",

          },

          {

          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\pages\\profil.js",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 42
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 1146,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default function Profil() {\n\n        {showWeightModal &amp;&amp; (\n          &lt;div className=\"modal-overlay\" onClick={() =&gt; { if (!submittingWeight) { setShowWeightModal(false); setWeightError(''); } }}&gt;\n            &lt;div className=\"modal\" onClick={(e) =&gt; e.stopPropagation()}&gt;\n              &lt;div className=\"modal-header\"&gt;\n                &lt;h3&gt;⚖️ Přidat váhu&lt;/h3&gt;\n                &lt;button type=\"button\" onClick={() =&gt; { if (!submittingWeight) { setShowWeightModal(false); setWeightError(''); } }} aria-label=\"Zavřít\"&gt;×&lt;/button&gt;\n              &lt;/div&gt;\n              &lt;form onSubmit={handleAddWeight} className=\"modal-form\"&gt;\n                &lt;div&gt;\n                  &lt;label&gt;Datum měření&lt;/label&gt;\n                  &lt;input\n                    type=\"date\"\n                    value={weightForm.date}\n                    onChange={(e) =&gt; setWeightForm((f) =&gt; ({ ...f, date: e.target.value }))}\n                    required\n                  /&gt;\n                &lt;/div&gt;\n                &lt;div&gt;\n                  &lt;label&gt;Váha (kg)&lt;/label&gt;\n                  &lt;input\n                    type=\"number\"\n                    min={30}\n                    max={300}\n                    step={0.1}\n                    placeholder=\"např. 78.5\"\n                    value={weightForm.weight_kg}\n                    onChange={(e) =&gt; setWeightForm((f) =&gt; ({ ...f, weight_kg: e.target.value }))}\n                    required\n                  /&gt;\n                &lt;/div&gt;\n                {weightError &amp;&amp; &lt;p className=\"modal-error\"&gt;{weightError}&lt;/p&gt;}\n                &lt;p className=\"modal-hint\"&gt;Postava a graf váhy se hned přepočítají. Výška se bere z posledního měření.&lt;/p&gt;\n                &lt;div className=\"modal-actions\"&gt;\n                  &lt;button type=\"button\" onClick={() =&gt; { if (!submittingWeight) { setShowWeightModal(false); setWeightError(''); } }} className=\"btn-ghost\"&gt;Zrušit&lt;/button&gt;\n                  &lt;button type=\"submit\"\n}",
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 43,

              },
              "endPosition": {

            "text": "        {showWeightModal &amp;&amp; (",

          {
            "text": "                &lt;h3&gt;⚖️ Přidat váhu&lt;/h3&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 563
          },
          {
            "text": "                &lt;button type=\"button\" onClick={() =&gt; { if (!submittingWeight) { setShowWeightModal(false); setWeightError(''); } }} aria-label=\"Zavřít\"&gt;×&lt;/button&gt;",

          },
          {

          {

          },
          {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\pages\\api\\profile.js",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 3
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 83,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "export default async function handler(req, res) {\n\n    bodyMetrics\n      .filter(m =&gt; m.weight_kg != null &amp;&amp; m.created_at)\n      .forEach(m =&gt; {\n        const d = m.created_at.split('T')[0];\n        if (!(d in weightByDate)) weightByDate[d] = m.weight_kg;\n      });\n    const weightHistory = Object.entries(weightByDate)\n      .map(([date, weight]) =&gt; ({ date, weight }))\n      .sort((a, b) =&gt; (a.date || '').localeCompare(b.date || ''));\n\n    const now = new Date();\n    const weekStart = new Date(now);\n    weekStart.setDate(now.getDate() - now.getDay() + (now.getDay() === 0 ? -6 : 1));\n    const weekStartStr = weekStart.toISOString().split('T')[0];\n    const workoutsThisWeek = workouts.filter(w =&gt; (w.workout_date || '') &gt;= weekStartStr).length;\n\n    return res.status(200).json({\n      user: {\n        id: user.id,\n        email: user.email,\n        name: user.user_metadata?.name || null\n      },\n      body_metrics: bodyMetrics,\n      plans: plansData,\n      workouts,\n      weight_history: weightHistory,\n      stats: {\n        workouts_this_week: workoutsThisWeek,\n        total_workouts: workouts.length\n      }\n    });\n  } catch (err) {\n    console.error('[profile] ERROR:', err);\n    return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Chyba serveru' });\n  }\n}",
        "signatures": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": ".\\components\\BodyFigure.js",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
